hooks.command: PROFILE_CONFIG="$HOME/.claude/plugins/config/my-assistant/profile.md"; if [ -f "$PROFILE_CONFIG" ]; then cat "$PROFILE_CONFIG"; elif [ -f ./profile.md ]; then cat ./profile.md; else echo 'assistant: no profile found at ~/.claude/plugins/config/my-assistant/profile.md or profile.md in your open workspace. Run /assistant:setup to create one. The plugin still works with pasted content.'; fi
